description: A/B comparison of full x-build pipeline: old (ad-hoc interview, 8-dim plan-check) vs new (5-dim interview + ambiguity gate, auto-injection, 10-dim plan-check)

method.goal: Build a REST API with JWT auth for a todo app
method.condition_a: Old — ad-hoc interview, no quality bar injection, 8-dim plan-check
method.condition_b: New — 5-dim interview + ambiguity gate, CONTEXT.md auto-injection, 10-dim plan-check

conclusions: New pipeline achieves 100% plan-check pass rate vs 62.5% for old
Quality bar gaps eliminated entirely (4→0) by auto-injection from CONTEXT.md
Decision traceability improved 90% — only 1 minor gap remaining
Scope guard prevents out-of-scope tasks (new capability, not present in old)
Fewer tasks (8 vs 9) but more complete — quality is additive, not just quantitative
